description: Results with 0-20 characters of scraped content (Facebook: 0 chars, UpToDate: 20 chars) are ranked in positions 1-2, indicating the ranking pipeline does not incorporate content-availability as a signal. Broken results should be filtered or heavily penalized before RRF fusion.
suggested_fix: Add a post-scrape content-availability gate: results with <50 chars body text or placeholder-pattern matches are excluded from ranking or receive a 0.1x penalty multiplier.

description: In every TC, at least one low-authority or query-irrelevant source outranks a high-relevance source. Facebook (auth=0.2) above Cornell (rel=0.95); CDC child ADHD (rel=0.2) above ScienceDirect (rel=0.95); IDSA acute COVID (rel=0.0) above ERS long COVID (rel=1.0). The ranking signal does not combine authority and relevance into a composite.
suggested_fix: Implement final_score = authority_score × 0.4 + query_relevance_score × 0.4 + content_quality_score × 0.2 as a re-ranking step.

description: When a low-authority page mirrors the snippet of a high-authority page (Facebook copying Harvard's 'Strict AI Policies' text), the ranker treats both as equally relevant and may place the mirror first due to tie-breaking by recency or other secondary signals.
suggested_fix: Compute MinHash/SimHash fingerprints of snippets; collapse >85% similar results keeping only the highest-authority source.

description: JS-rendered pages (UpToDate) return loading placeholders and PDF-locked academic pages (ERS) return only abstracts. These are often the most content-rich sources for medical queries, so their loss disproportionately impacts content_specificity and diagnostic_criteria_coverage.
suggested_fix: Two-stage scrape: (1) detect <200 chars or placeholder patterns → retry with headless browser, (2) detect PDF links on academic domains → invoke PyMuPDF parser.

description: A duplicate _baseline_fidelity dimension inverts the scrape_score scale (L1=best interpreted as 0.2/1.0=worst), creating false contrastive_fail flags and deflating fidelity scores by ~0.3 points across all TCs.
suggested_fix: Remove duplicate dimension instance; add scale-mapping guard converting scrape_level to normalized 0-1 quality score before averaging.
